title: Beyth #1053
definition:
Beth-shemesh = "house of the sun" or "sun-temple"

 1) a town in southwest Judah
 2) a town in Naphtali
 3) a town in Issachar
 4) a town in Egypt
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-shemesh = "house of the sun" or "sun-temple"

 1) a town in southwest Judah
 2) a town in Naphtali
 3) a town in Issachar
 4) a town in Egypt

    NASB:  sun temple, three places in Pal., also a place in Eg.
